name: zot24-skills
description: An opinionated selection of skills for daily dev workflows

plugins.name: umbrel-app
plugins.description: Expert assistant for developing, packaging, testing, and submitting apps for umbrelOS

plugins.name: claude-code-expert
plugins.description: Comprehensive Claude Code and Anthropic ecosystem knowledge. Official patterns for agents, skills, hooks, commands, and MCP.

plugins.name: openclaw
plugins.description: Expert on OpenClaw (formerly Clawdbot) - AI assistant framework connecting Claude/LLMs to messaging platforms (WhatsApp, Telegram, Discord, Slack, Signal, iMessage, Teams, Google Chat, Matrix, BlueBubbles, Zalo)

plugins.name: agent-browser
plugins.description: Expert on agent-browser - Vercel's headless browser automation CLI for AI agents with 50+ commands, snapshots, and multi-session support

plugins.name: chat-sdk
plugins.description: Expert on Chat SDK - Vercel's open-source template for building production-ready AI chatbots with generative UI, artifacts, and multi-provider support

plugins.name: ai-sdk
plugins.description: Expert on AI SDK - Vercel's TypeScript toolkit for building AI applications with unified LLM API, streaming, tool calling, and agents

plugins.name: agent-skills
plugins.description: Expert at the Agent Skills open format for extending AI agent capabilities - create, validate, and understand SKILL.md files

plugins.name: safe-delete
plugins.description: Prevents catastrophic file deletion by transforming rm commands to trash and blocking dangerous patterns like rm -rf /

plugins.name: x-engagement
plugins.description: Crafts high-engagement X (Twitter) content using conversation hijacking, authority building, and strategic hooks

plugins.name: hermes
plugins.description: Expert at understanding and working with Hermes Agent — its memory system, skills, cron jobs, tools, and behavioral conventions

plugins.name: honcho
plugins.description: Expert on Honcho — AI-native memory and context platform for LLM applications with persistent memory, user modeling, and context management

plugins.name: gh-issue-tracker
plugins.description: Install, configure, and manage gh-issue-tracker — lightweight error tracking that creates GitHub Issues with deduplication, fingerprinting, and rate limiting

plugins.name: firecrawl
plugins.description: Expert on Firecrawl — web scraping, crawling, search, and browser automation API for AI agents with clean LLM-ready output

plugins.name: managing-servarr
plugins.description: Deploy, configure, and manage the full media stack — Sonarr, Radarr, Lidarr, Prowlarr, Plex, Overseerr, qBittorrent, Bazarr, and Recyclarr

plugins.name: managing-obsidian
plugins.description: Manage and optimize Obsidian vaults — organization, Dataview, Templater, workflows, MCP integration, plugins, sync, and publishing

plugins.name: managing-adguard
plugins.description: Deploy, configure, and manage AdGuard Home — network-wide DNS ad blocking, filtering, DHCP, client management, and REST API automation

plugins.name: managing-immich
plugins.description: Deploy, configure, and manage Immich — self-hosted photo and video management with machine learning, facial recognition, mobile backup, and REST API

plugins.name: managing-glinet
plugins.description: Configure and manage GL.iNet routers — VPN (WireGuard, OpenVPN, Tailscale), AdGuard Home, DNS, multi-WAN failover, drop-in gateway, firewall, and network modes

plugins.name: managing-umami
plugins.description: Deploy, configure, and manage Umami — open-source privacy-focused web analytics with API client, tracker, events, statistics, reports, and team management
